name: flashsupport-web-service
description: Web Service for FlashSupport UI delivery and BFF orchestration

scripts.dev: npm run build:client && mkdir -p dist/public && cp src/frontend/index.html dist/public/index.html && cp src/frontend/styles.css dist/public/styles.css && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client && mkdir -p dist/public && cp src/frontend/index.html dist/public/index.html && cp src/frontend/styles.css dist/public/styles.css
